action: Add a deterministic canonical queue change proposal stage that consumes an approved review authorization but cannot mutate ACTIVE_QUEUE.json.

result.verification: Six deterministic Node tests passed locally against byte-identical files before commit.
result.privacy_boundary: Public repository state and abstract queue metadata only; raw private chat, health information, credentials, identifying personal data, and unreviewed uploads excluded.

claim_states.observed: A digest-bound append proposal can be generated from an approved bounded authorization without modifying canonical queue input.
claim_states.inferred: Proposal generation and application must remain separate authority domains.
claim_states.proposed: Bind an authenticated human reviewer identity and create a post-manual-application verification record.
claim_states.superseded: The lack of a canonical queue proposal format after review approval.
claim_states.unresolved: Authenticated reviewer evidence and a real manual adoption commit remain absent.

next_action: Create a reviewer-identity evidence contract, then verify any human-applied queue commit against the authorized proposal digest and prior canonical queue blob.
